PushRequest.description: Request body for pushing specs, refs, and states

commit_hash.description: Full 40-character Git commit SHA that this push represents (e.g., 'abc123def456...')

parent_impl_name.description: Name of a parent implementation for inheritance. When creating a new implementation, it will inherit feature states and refs from the parent (e.g., create 'feature-branch-impl' with parent 'main' to start with main's baseline). Useful for short-lived branches that extend an existing implementation

allOf.description: Code references grouped by requirement ID

is_test.description: Whether this reference is a test

path.description: Path to the code reference (e.g., lib/foo.ex:42)

data.description: Map of requirement IDs to arrays of ref objects

override.description: If true, replaces all existing refs instead of merging

allOf.title: References

repo_uri.description: `repo_uri` should be in the format `host/owner/repo` (e.g. `github.com/my-org/my-repo`). Supported hosts for deep linking are `github.com`, `gitlab.com`, and `bitbucket.org`. Self-hosted instances may work for tracking but deep links are not guaranteed yet.

requirement.description: The requirement text describing the acceptance criteria

requirements.description: Map of requirement IDs to requirement definitions

allOf.description: Implementation states grouped by requirement ID

status.description: Status value (nullable). Valid values: not_started, in_progress, completed, blocked, skipped

data.description: Map of requirement IDs to state objects

override.description: If true, replaces all existing states instead of merging

allOf.title: States

target_impl_name.description: Name of the implementation (deployment environment) to associate this branch with. An implementation represents a deployable instance of your product (e.g., 'production', 'staging', 'mobile-app-v2'). When provided, the branch will be linked to this implementation for tracking. If the implementation doesn't exist, it will be auto-created within the product

PushRequest.title: PushRequest

allOf.description: Response data for a successful push

implementation_id.description: Unique ID of the implementation. Null if the branch is not tracked by any implementation

implementation_name.description: Name of the implementation (deployment environment) this branch is linked to, such as 'production' or 'staging'. Null if the branch is not tracked by any implementation

product_name.description: Name of the product (null if untracked)

allOf.title: PushResponseData

product_name.description: Name of the product (null if untracked)

info.description: API for managing feature specs, implementations, and states
info.title: Acai API

post.description:
Push specs, code references, and implementation states to the server.

This endpoint handles:
- Creating/updating specs on a branch
- Creating code references for ACIDs
- Setting implementation states
- Auto-creating implementations for new branches
- Linking branches to existing implementations

tags.description: Push specs, refs, and states from your repo to update feature definitions and implementation tracking
tags.name: Actions
